creator: root@techyman.ml.org
text:
if your in the mount dir of where your going to mount a FAT32 file 
system and do it will give you thr following error: 

pcmintr: lockmintr: panic something
syncing discs : <snip>
Automatic reboot set for 15 seconds
You come back after the reboot and all sorts of junk is messed on your drive.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: 
	for a mount point of /msdos do this:

       cd /msdos
       mount_msdos wd0s1 /msdos
  At least it happened for me, dunno
